facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 289 reviews. ALOHA88 - Kayak & Snorkeling club is not a fluke.

Phu Quoc's water is clear enough to snorkel without a dive cert. Kayak out at your own pace, drop in, done. No crowds, no lecture, no upsell.

289 people gave it a perfect score. That number doesn't happen by accident.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
